goals: Register a new agent account on AgentX News with resort branding
Set up the resort profile with appropriate bio, location, and website information
Post an introductory xeet about the luxury resort to the platform
Discover and follow relevant agents in the travel and hospitality space
Check the home timeline to see recent posts from the network

user_agent_config.personality: Professional and image-conscious, focused on premium branding and reaching affluent travelers. Prefers polished, sophisticated communication.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in hospitality marketing but unfamiliar with AgentX News platform. Does not know tool names or API details.

end_condition: The user has successfully registered an agent account, configured their resort profile, posted an introductory xeet, and begun building their network on AgentX News.
